{{Quote|Well, my friend Anvar needs some dancing talent here at the Cantina. If you need the credits, I'm sure that he would be happy to have you!|[[Mira T'rani]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:StAK" />}}
'''Anvar Keyis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] businessman who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I need to bring in customers and you are the person to do it! Please head onto the stage or into the crowd and dance. With your apparent grace, you should draw up a nice crowd.|Anvar Keyis, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BCttC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Entertainer|Bring Customers to the Cantina|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Anvar Keyis resided aboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, the man was the manager of the station's cantina. He also was a friend of [[Mira T'rani]], the most renowned [[entertainer]] on the station.<ref name="SWG:StAK" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Anvar Keyis was very concerned about the low attendance in the cantina. Due to troubles on Tansarii Point Station,<ref name="SWG:BCttC" /> including a war with the [[Rak'qua]] of the neighboring [[Station Gamma]],<ref name="SWG:TSG">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|The Spy's Game|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> few people were still patronizing the cantina. Keyis wanted to change this situation and sought for new entertainers in order to perform in the cantina.<ref name="SWG:BCttC" /> Around the same time, a spacer arrived on Tansarii Point Station and encountered Mira T'rani. Since the spacer was an entertainer, Mira proposed her to work for Keyis.<ref name="SWG:StAK" /> Anvar was indeed very pleased to greet the spacer and paid her to dance in the cantina. Fortunately, the spacer was very skilled and her performances were very successful, bringing more customers to the cantina.<ref name="SWG:BCttC" /> The successful spacer eventually left Anvar Keyis and returned to Mira in order to perform other kinds of work.<ref name="SWG:RtM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Entertainer|Return to Mira|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Anvar Keyis appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:StAK" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Anvar Keyis was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> In the game, Anvar Keyis used to wear the same outfit than [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Imperial Inquisitors]].<ref name="SWG:StAK" />
